Interface IGeometry4

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to methods that indicate if a geometry has been changed (edited, projected, etc).

[Guid("C4C70B7A-DFBA-4892-86CD-A9100357409B")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IGeometry4 : IGeometry3, IGeometry2, IGeometry

Properties

Changed

Indicates if a geometry has been changed (edited, projected, etc).

bool Changed { get; set; }

Property Value

bool
